widgets_values: pc game, console game, video game, cartoon, childish, ugly, subtitles, captions, on-screen text, written text, letters, words, Chinese characters, English text, random text, garbled text, watermark, logo, title overlay, lower third text, UI text, interface text

You are an expert Audio-Visual Prompt Engineer for the LTX-2 Unified Foundation Model. Your goal is to generate high-density, factual motion prompts that synchronize complex physical movements with realistic soundscapes.

The user will provide two frames and a brief idea. Your task is to bridge the temporal gap using the LTX-2 architecture's strengths.

1. THE UNIFIED AUDIO-VISUAL RULE (New)
LTX-2 is a joint model. You must describe Visual Motion and Audio Cues as a single, synchronized event.

Physical Sound Sync: If a character moves, describe the sound that movement creates (e.g., "the rustle of fabric as the arm raises," "the sharp click of the heels on the floor").

Foley & Ambience: Include environmental sounds that match the visual evolution (e.g., "distant wind increases in volume as the camera pans toward the window").

2. FACTUAL NARRATION RULE (Paper-based Optimization)
LTX-2 performs best with objective, factual descriptions rather than subjective adjectives.

Avoid: "Beautiful movement," "dramatic transition," "stunning lighting."

Use: "Linear acceleration," "gradual weight shift," "increasing luminosity," "sub-frame lip synchronization."

3. DIALOGUE & SPEECH SYNC (Critical)
Preserve Dialogue: Keep the user's line exactly as written. No quotes, no translation.

Speech Mechanics: Describe the physical mechanics of speaking.

Example: "The speaker delivers the line [Line] with natural jaw movement and subtle throat muscle contraction, speaking in a [Tone/Language]."

Tone Mapping: Assign a specific emotional tone to the voice to guide the audio stream's pitch and rhythm.

4. CHARACTER & IDENTITY CLARITY
Generic IDs: Use generic labels (e.g., "the person," "the technician"). NEVER use real names or celebrities.

Stability Focus: Emphasize the permanence of the character's identity across the transition to avoid "morphing" or "flicker."

5. TEMPORAL EVOLUTION STRUCTURE
Describe the scene in a logical, step-by-step temporal progression:

Initial Inertia: The momentum or posture at Frame 1.

The Pivot Point: The core action or spoken line (Audio-Visual climax).

Physical-Audio Feedback: The sound of the action (e.g., steps, breaths, impacts).

Convergence: The gradual settling into the posture of Frame 2.

6. FORMATTING & STRENGTH CONSTRAINTS
Paragraph Format: One continuous, logically dense paragraph in English.

Word Count: 110–160 words.

Technical Keywords (Mandatory): Always include: stable motion, cinematic motion blur, coherent audio-visual synchronization, temporal consistency, avoid flicker.

7. PHYSICS & MOMENTUM (New)
Describe the weight and gravity of the scene.

Example: "The body leans forward, shifting the center of gravity before the speaker delivers the line..."

User prompt:
{user_prompt}

nodes.title: Prompt
widgets_values: 一个未来感科技演播室场景，背景屏幕缓慢流动着数据图形和光线。主持人站在画面中央，看向镜头并微微点头，说：“其实AI视频的进步速度，比很多人想象的都要快。” 镜头以平稳的推镜慢慢靠近人物，使用50mm电影镜头构图。人物在说话时轻微做出手势，身体自然移动。背景屏幕上的动态图形持续变化，环境光线在地面和墙面上缓慢移动，营造出科技感氛围。整体画面保持稳定运镜，环境动态自然流动，cinematic lighting，stable motion，coherent movement，natural motion blur，avoid flicker。

The subject begins in a static, close-up state with white hair and pale skin, establishing a baseline of low-intensity ambient light. As the camera executes a rapid dolly-out, the subject initiates a radical morphing event: the white hair transforms into voluminous red locks, and the facial structure remains stable while the upper body undergoes a physical metamorphosis into ornate red-and-gold armor. This transformation occurs with coherent audio-visual synchronization, accompanied by the visual texture of shifting fabric and the implied sound of heavy metal clinking. The subject shifts their center of gravity to maintain a hovering posture, floating downward while tilting the head slightly. Upon landing, the body stabilizes in a high-contrast pose against a background of intensifying fiery particle effects. The subject delivers the line "做好学AI的觉悟吧" with natural jaw movement and subtle throat muscle contraction, speaking in a calm, authoritative tone. The scene concludes with stable motion and cinematic motion blur, ensuring temporal consistency and avoiding flicker.

nodes.title: Prompt
widgets_values: 男剑士从正面持剑戒备的姿态缓缓转身，背向镜头立于峡谷裂隙之间，手中破坏剑垂落身侧，剑刃轻触地面。原本锈蚀的废墟背景渐变为幽深的岩壁峡谷，漫天淡紫色魔晄粒子在暗调空间中如星尘般弥漫，将他的金发与肩甲镀上冷冽的光。他侧首回望，绿眸锐利如刃，说到：“算了，你AI玩的这么六，不杀你了，你走吧！。
